params.name: V8 Engine
params.description:
On Jul 12, 1923 AD, the world's first V8 engine was manufactured.
The classic cylinder arrangement of an internal combustion engine and also the most common engine structure in high-end cars. Due to its superior ignition and vibration characteristics, a number of its derivatives have been developed for high-end competitions.
